{"problem_standardized_math":"Consider the primal-dual system\n\\[\n\\begin{bmatrix}\n\\nabla_{xx}^2 \\mathcal L & 0 & A_E^T(x) & A_I^T(x) \\\\\n0 & \\Sigma & 0 & -I \\\\\nA_E(x) & 0 & 0 & 0 \\\\\nA_I(x) & -I & 0 & 0\n\\end{bmatrix}\n\\begin{bmatrix}\np_x \\\\\np_s \\\\\n-p_y \\\\\n-p_z\n\\end{bmatrix}\n=\n-\n\\begin{bmatrix}\n\\nabla f(x) - A_E^T(x)y - A_I^T(x)z \\\\\nz - \\mu S^{-1}e \\\\\nc_E(x) \\\\\nc_I(x) - s\n\\end{bmatrix},\n\\qquad \\Sigma = S^{-1}Z.\n\\]\nIntroduce the change of variables \\(\\tilde p_s = S^{-1}p_s\\) in this system, and show that the \\((2,2)\\) block of the primal-dual matrix has a cluster of eigenvalues around \\(0\\) as \\(\\mu \\to 0\\)."}
